title: One button to share view links or publish views
description: Jira Product Discovery now offers an enhanced experience to help you connect with team members and external stakeholders more efficiently. We've combined sharing and publishing under one button so you can easily decide whether to distribute links internally or make views available to people outside your organization. Select Share on any view to see both options, then choose the one that best suits your target audience. Copying shared or published view links is now faster with a dedicated link bu
